
Boundary element model (BEM)
============================

This module may be employed to calcualte the boundary element model for EEG/MEG source reconstruction.

.. currentmodule:: source_reconstruction.bem_model
.. autofunction:: read_skull_and_skin_models

.. currentmodule:: source_reconstruction.bem_model
.. autofunction:: calc_skull_and_skin_models

.. currentmodule:: source_reconstruction.bem_model
.. autofunction:: calc_bem_model_linear_basis

.. currentmodule:: source_reconstruction.bem_model
.. autofunction:: plot_skull_and_skin_models

.. currentmodule:: source_reconstruction.bem_model
.. autofunction:: _load_and_orient_t1

.. currentmodule:: source_reconstruction.bem_model
.. autofunction:: _plot_skull_and_skin_subplots

.. currentmodule:: source_reconstruction.bem_model
.. autofunction:: _find_non_diag_omega

.. currentmodule:: source_reconstruction.bem_model
.. autofunction:: _find_diag_omega
